{"action": "call_codex_mcp", "spec": "# City Footprint Map — Product Spec

## Overview
A React web app where users light up Chinese cities they've visited on an interactive map. Two independent recording modes with color gradients, local storage persistence, statistics dashboard, achievements, and poster sharing. Mobile-first, deployed under nginx /cityprint/ path prefix.

## Tech Stack
- React 18 + Vite + TypeScript
- ECharts 5 with China GeoJSON map
- Zustand for state management\

request: Build a City Footprint Map web app: React + ECharts China map, users light up cities they've visited. Two modes: stay duration (blue gradient) and last departure (warm gradient). Local storage persistence, import/export JSON, statistics panel, achievement badges, poster generation, mobile-first responsive. Design system: DESIGN.md 'Luminous High-Energy System' with Electric Blue primary, Inter font, Glassmorphism cards. Deploy under nginx /cityprint/ path prefix.
